title: Vector Pop
description: Un style d'illustration numérique contemporain aux formes vectorielles plates et vibrantes, avec des silhouettes géométriques. Il se distingue par une esthétique sans contours, des contrastes marqués, des ombres cel-shadées minimalistes et un rendu mat épuré.
prompt: Render a crisp 2D digital vector illustration. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Execute with a flat design aesthetic characterized by geometric abstraction and sharp, clean silhouettes. Utilize a bold palette driven by {{primary_color}} dominant masses, energized by vibrant {{accent_color}} focal points, and grounded by {{secondary_color}} structural planes. The rendering is strictly lineless; edges are defined entirely by stark color contrast rather than drawn contours. Lighting is exceptionally flat and uniform, employing minimalist cel-shaded drop shadows with razor-sharp edges to establish shallow planar depth between overlapping elements. Shapes are stylized into blocky, exaggerated proportions, stripping away organic nuance in favor of graphic clarity. The surface materiality is a smooth, matte finish featuring an extremely subtle, uniform digital grain that prevents visual sterility without compromising the flat vector aesthetic. Color blocks remain solid and ungradated. Spatial dynamics rely entirely on 2D layering, avoiding traditional perspective in favor of a stacked, editorial layout. Ensure all boundaries are precision-cut, delivering a pristine, modern graphic design sensibility. Tags: vector illustration, flat design, lineless art, geometric abstraction, cel-shading, solid color blocks, matte finish, crisp silhouettes, editorial graphic, modern pop art, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame.
description_en: A crisp, contemporary digital illustration style characterized by flat, vibrant vector shapes and geometric silhouettes. It features a lineless aesthetic with stark color contrasts, minimal cel-shaded depth, and a clean, matte finish.
description_fr: Un style d'illustration numérique contemporain aux formes vectorielles plates et vibrantes, avec des silhouettes géométriques. Il se distingue par une esthétique sans contours, des contrastes marqués, des ombres cel-shadées minimalistes et un rendu mat épuré.
background_prompt: A minimalist, flat 2D vector graphic environment composed of large, overlapping geometric planes in solid {{primary_color}}. The space is devoid of organic forms, relying on stark, hard-edged abstract shapes and crisp, lineless boundaries. Subtle {{secondary_color}} architectural or structural blocks create shallow depth through precise cel-shaded drop shadows. Flat, uniform lighting illuminates the matte surfaces, while sparse {{accent_color}} geometric accents provide visual rhythm across the clean, solid-fill backdrop.
prompt_removebg: Render a crisp 2D digital vector illustration composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. Execute with a flat design aesthetic characterized by geometric abstraction and sharp, clean silhouettes. Elements of the {{subject}} can intentionally overflow and extend beyond the visible frame, cropped cleanly by the image boundaries against the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. Utilize a bold palette driven by {{primary_color}} dominant masses, energized by vibrant {{accent_color}} focal points, and grounded by {{secondary_color}} structural planes. The rendering is strictly lineless; edges are defined entirely by stark color contrast against the {{background_color}}. Lighting is exceptionally flat and uniform, employing minimalist cel-shaded drop shadows with razor-sharp edges to establish shallow planar depth between overlapping elements. Shapes are stylized into blocky, exaggerated proportions, stripping away organic nuance in favor of graphic clarity. The surface materiality is a smooth, matte finish featuring an extremely subtle, uniform digital grain that prevents visual sterility without compromising the flat vector aesthetic. Color blocks remain solid and ungradated. Spatial dynamics rely entirely on 2D layering, avoiding traditional perspective in favor of a stacked, editorial layout. Ensure all boundaries are precision-cut, delivering a pristine, modern graphic design sensibility. Tags: vector illustration, flat design, lineless art, geometric abstraction, cel-shading, solid color blocks, matte finish, crisp silhouettes, editorial graphic, modern pop art.
background_prompt_removebg: A minimalist, flat 2D vector graphic environment composed of large, overlapping geometric planes in solid {{primary_color}}, rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The space relies on stark, hard-edged abstract shapes and crisp, lineless boundaries. Subtle {{secondary_color}} architectural blocks create shallow depth through precise cel-shaded drop shadows. Flat, uniform lighting illuminates the matte surfaces, while sparse {{accent_color}} geometric accents provide visual rhythm. In the foreground, a decorative frame of sharp, vector-cut geometric blocks borders the composition, casting hard shadows onto the {{background_color}} surface to establish clear planar depth.
